goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 08:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 08:45 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on saturday
Make sure you get price and travel time
